description: Skeleton manifest for trusted Clear_JSON postflop fixtures. Cases are added in V0.2.3.

source_policy.real_clear_json_policy: real files must remain close to PokerVision output and must not be hand-improved
source_policy.synthetic_clear_json_policy: synthetic files preserve real Clear_JSON structure while changing poker scenario fields
source_policy.temporary_json_policy: dark/pending/service/runtime source artifacts are not accepted as solver fixtures

expected_policy.purpose: expected files describe solver interpretation only, not fold/call/bet decisions
